titleStmt.title: Corpus parlementaire français ParlaMint-FR, session ordinaire 17/02/2022 (158) [ParlaMint.ana]
French parliamentary corpus ParlaMint-FR, ordinary session 17/02/2022 (158) [ParlaMint.ana]
Comptes-rendus des débats en séance publique de l'Assemblée Nationale, séance : 158, 17/02/2022
Proceedings of the debates in plenary sitting of the Assemblée Nationale, sitting: 158, 17/02/2022

respStmt.resp: Encodage du corpus selon ParlaMint TEI XML

funder.orgName: OSCARS (Open Science Clusters' Action for Research & Society)

availability.p: This work is licensed under the terms of the Creative Commons Attribution 4.0 International License

bibl.title: Travaux parlementaires (Assemblée nationale)
Débats en séance publique - Comptes rendus au format XML

projectDesc.p: ParlaMint is a project that aims to (1) create a multilingual set of comparable corpora of parliamentary proceedings uniformly encoded according to the ParlaMint encoding guidelines, covering the period from 2015 to mid-2022; (2) add linguistic annotations to the corpora and machine-translate them to English; (3) make the corpora available through concordancers; and (4) build use cases in Political Sciences and Digital Humanities based on the corpus data.

revisionDesc.change: Tomaž Erjavec: Include topic and sentiment related information.
Giancarlo Luxardo: ParlaMint II update, vs 3.0.
